action.reasoning: Observation: Best test score is 0.6199 from DINOv2 5-epoch partial fine-tuning (all params). Frozen backbone got 0.5364. More training hurts. Analysis: The sweet spot is minimal fine-tuning of DINOv2. The original model trained all params for 5 epochs. I should try: (1) unfreeze last 2 blocks + head, train 8 epochs - this is between full fine-tuning and frozen; (2) use weighted CE loss; (3) use weighted sampler. Also try higher resolution (336px) since DINOv2 handles it well. The key is to not overfit to source domain backgrounds.
